certification.note: 2026-07-09 human adjudication: Journal (item 55) records the 11-4 vote with McOsker=Aye, Soto-Martínez=Nay; CFMS records the same tally with McOsker=NO, Soto-Martínez=YES. The extractor matches the Journal text exactly; LA's two official systems disagree. Vote stays quarantined (ingested, never certified).
